summary: Unified Booking & Fallback Layer (Iteration 81) - All 32 backend API tests PASS (100%). Frontend Supplier Settings tab fully functional with 4 supplier cards (RateHawk, TBO, Paximum, WWTatil), capability matrix, and product coverage summary. Unified Booking Layer implementation verified: real adapter bridges, fan-out search by product type, price revalidation guard, booking with fallback chain, reconciliation tracking, and audit observability.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/unified-booking/registry returns 9 adapters (4 real + 5 mock) with fallback chains correctly configured
Fallback chains verified: ratehawk→[tbo,paximum], tbo→[ratehawk,paximum], paximum→[ratehawk,tbo], wwtatil→[tbo]
POST /api/unified-booking/search correctly routes by product type: hotel→3 suppliers, tour→2, flight→1, transfer→1, activity→1
Price revalidation returns drift calculation with thresholds: <2% silent, 2-5% warn, 5-10% approval, >10% abort
Booking execution includes fallback chain execution when primary fails
Audit trail persists in MongoDB 'booking_audit_log' collection
Frontend capability matrix shows all 4 suppliers with correct product type checkmarks
Stats bar shows Total: 4, Connected: 0, Saved: 4 (credentials saved but not authenticated with test creds)
All supplier cards have Test Connection, Edit, Remove buttons working

success_rate.frontend: 100% (4 supplier cards, capability matrix, product coverage, save/test/delete flow functional)

test_credentials: Super Admin: agent@acenta.test / agent123 (for /api/unified-booking/registry), Agency Admin: agency1@demo.test / agency123
seed_data_creation: Test credentials already saved for agency1@demo.test (from iteration 80). Search/revalidation/booking tests create audit entries in MongoDB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Booking Layer (iteration 81) fully tested. Key endpoints: /api/unified-booking/registry, /metrics, /search, /revalidate, /book, /audit, /reconciliation. All 4 real suppliers (ratehawk, tbo, paximum, wwtatil) registered with correct product type routing and fallback chains. Supplier API calls fail with test credentials (expected) - flow verification focus, not supplier connectivity. Frontend Supplier Settings tab at /app/admin/platform-hardening shows capability matrix and 4 supplier cards with masked credentials.

features_verified.GET_registry: PASS - Returns 9 adapters (4 real + 5 mock) with capability metadata and fallback chains
features_verified.GET_metrics: PASS - Returns booking_attempts_total, booking_success_total, booking_failure_total, fallback_trigger_total, revalidation counters, supplier_latency
features_verified.POST_search_hotel: PASS - Fans to ratehawk, tbo, paximum (3 suppliers)
features_verified.POST_search_tour: PASS - Fans to tbo, wwtatil (2 suppliers)
features_verified.POST_search_flight: PASS - Fans to tbo only (1 supplier)
features_verified.POST_search_transfer: PASS - Fans to paximum only (1 supplier)
features_verified.POST_search_activity: PASS - Fans to paximum only (1 supplier)
features_verified.POST_revalidate: PASS - Returns drift calculation with valid, original_price, current_price, price_drift_pct, can_proceed, requires_approval
features_verified.POST_book: PASS - Returns status, internal_booking_id, fallback_used, duration_ms
features_verified.GET_audit_org: PASS - Returns organization audit trail with event_type, timestamp, supplier_code
features_verified.GET_audit_booking: PASS - Returns filtered audit events for specific booking_id
features_verified.GET_reconciliation: PASS - Returns found, price_mismatch, status_mismatch for booking
features_verified.GET_reconciliation_mismatches: PASS - Returns mismatches list and summary with total, price_mismatches, status_mismatches
features_verified.GET_supported_suppliers: PASS - Returns 4 suppliers with required_fields and optional_fields
features_verified.GET_capabilities: PASS - Returns 4 suppliers with capabilities and product_coverage
features_verified.Frontend_Supplier_Settings: PASS - Tab clickable, shows 4 supplier cards with correct data-testid attributes
features_verified.Frontend_Capability_Matrix: PASS - Shows all suppliers with hotel/flight/tour/transfer/activity checkmarks
features_verified.Frontend_Stats_Bar: PASS - Total: 4, Connected: 0, Saved: 4 displayed correctly

mocked_note: No mocked APIs. Real supplier endpoints are called but fail with test credentials (expected behavior). Testing focused on orchestration flow, routing, fallback, and audit - not supplier connectivity.
